calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Mar-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:26am and concluding at 9:39am.

Plaintiff Namdev Sharma appearing represented by Philip Allan Segal, Esq., via zoom.
Defendant Josue Daniel Alonzo Del Aguila not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines Plaintiff Namdev Sharma and he confirms statements made by counsel.

Mr. Segal dismisses Defendant Garcia Jessica Lizbeth and the Does on the record.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Namdev Sharma, and against Defendant Josue Daniel Alonzo Del Aguila, as follows:

Damages: $30,500.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $35,500.00

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Continued To Mar-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Namdev Sharma was not present.
Attorney for Plaintiff Philip Allan Segal apepared via zoom.
Defendant Garcia Jessica Lizabeth not appearing.

This matter is continued to allow Mr. Allan to prepare and file a statement of damages and to have the Petitioner as the person most knowledgable to appear.

This matter is continued to March 13, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.
